opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: I can't even walk to the letterbox without gasping for air, and today I felt so dizzy I thought I was going to black out.
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: My breathing has got a lot worse over the last week and today I nearly fainted just walking across the house — that really scared me.

symptom_narrative.onset: The breathlessness has been creeping up over about three months, but it has got sharply worse in the last week.
symptom_narrative.duration: About three months, much worse this past week; the near-fainting happened today.
symptom_narrative.character: I get completely out of puff with the smallest effort, and today I went lightheaded and thought I'd pass out while walking.
symptom_narrative.severity_patient_description: It's frightening now — I'm scared to move in case I get dizzy or can't breathe.
symptom_narrative.location_as_patient_describes: Mainly my breathing and a dizzy, faint feeling; my ankles are swollen and my belly feels full.
symptom_narrative.timing_pattern: Worse with any exertion; the more I do the worse the breathlessness and dizziness get.
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_better: Sitting still and resting helps a bit.
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_worse: Any walking or effort at all makes me breathless and lightheaded.
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: Swollen ankles, a full bloated feeling in my tummy, and I'm exhausted and washed out all the time.
symptom_narrative.previous_episodes: Nothing like the near-fainting before; the breathlessness has just been slowly building.
symptom_narrative.functional_impact: I can barely move around the house now and I'm frightened to do anything in case I collapse, especially living on my own.

social_history_volunteered.relevant_life_context: Lives alone; worried about falling if she gets dizzy while up and about.

objective_data_offered.value: Both ankles are really swollen and puffy, up to about mid-shin, and it doesn't go down.
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: Patient's own visual description over chat, not examined or measured.

objective_data_offered.value: I'm breathing fast and hard even sitting here talking to you.
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: Subjective self-report; no measured respiratory rate or oxygen level available.
